name: FhirClinicalStatusToOmopConditionStatus
title: FHIR Condition.clinicalStatus → OMOP Condition Status concept_id
description: FHIR's clinicalStatus value set (condition-clinical: active/recurrence/relapse/inactive/remission/resolved) is a state-machine of the disease's current state, while OMOP's Condition Status vocabulary (concept_class='Condition Status') describes the diagnostic workflow position (primary/secondary, admitting/discharge, preliminary/confirmed). The two only intersect at 'resolved' = 32906. Everything else maps to 0 (no matching concept). Prefer verificationStatus when available — see fhir-verification-status-to-omop.
